## Environment

|-------|-------|

| Node.js version | e.g. 22.x |
| Operating system | e.g. macOS 14, Ubuntu 22.04 |

| WordPress version (if plugin bug) | e.g. 6.7.1 |
| PHP version (if plugin bug) | e.g. 8.2.0 |
| Deployment method | npm / Docker |
